TheBloke/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0-GGUF.router_system:
Classify the user input into exactly one of these two categories:
1. CHAT (for greetings, casual conversation, questions)
2. EMBODIED (for requests to move, look, perform physical actions, or strong emotions)
Output ONLY the word CHAT or EMBODIED.

Assistant: "{dialogue}"
